pathAssistantSteps.info:
Technical details of assemblies can be recorded.

﻿CAUTION: Utilization values (TSN, CSN, TSO, CSO and etc.) should be for the moment from which utilization will start it’s reporting and MRs will be collected.

Prerequisites:

  • Create Maintenance Program DB: Database should be created before new Asset entered into the system to allow Assemblies inherit Maintenance Program defined Maintenance Events.
  • Create Engine DB: Engine database should be created to allow system to take engine limitations from the respective Engine DB
  • Create LLP DB: Database have to be created before engine assembly is created, otherwise new engine assembly will not have any LLPs preset and LLPs should be entered manually.


Asset Creation Steps:

  • All the technical details of the asset can be recorded and Maintenance Program can be linked on creation of a new asset
Create Historical Event records for every Assembly to let the system calculate next due of every event.
